primitive: canonical embedding model ants-embed-v1: BGE-M3 dense embedding (tokenize, wrap <s>..</s>, forward, CLS-pool, L2-normalise)
generator: ants-client cache/embedding/tools/embed_vectors.c --pack: hashes and embeddings emitted by the compiled ants_embed library; init strict-verified weights+tokenizer against the pinned v1 hashes first
notes: The model hashes are the bit-exact cross-platform pin (a peer MUST load files hashing to these). The per-input embedding arrays are REFERENCE with tolerance: the F32 forward's reduction order is not yet canonical across platforms (open in RFC-0009), so conformant peers agree to cosine >= 0.999, not bit-for-bit. Floats are %.9g decimal (round-trips float32). Cross-checked vs llama.cpp llama-embedding at cosine >= 0.999999.

vectors.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
